message:
Command `
# Wait and poll DRT progress every 5 minutes — check for routing iterations
sleep 300
echo "=== DRT progress check: $(date) ==="
tail -25 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
echo ""
ls -lh "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
echo ""
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2, "CPU:"$3"%", "MEM:"$4"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}'
` executed with exit code -1.
